CREATE TABLE test_decimal (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(18, 0));
CREATE TABLE other_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ref_value DECIMAL(18, 0));
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.ref_value FROM test_decimal t1 JOIN other_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.value < t2.ref_value;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_decimal WHERE value BETWEEN 1 AND 999999999999999999;
SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_decimal WHERE value > 100000000000000000;
SELECT value FROM test_decimal WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM other_table WHERE ref_value > 150000000000000000);
SELECT t1.id, (t1.value + t2.ref_value) AS total FROM test_decimal t1, other_table t2 WHERE t1.id = t2.id;
UPDATE test_decimal SET value = value * 2 WHERE id = 3;
